name: List
description: Avatar-anchored List variant — each row carries a leading [Thumbnail](../thumbnail/thumbnail.md) (channel logo, source mark, profile photo). The label column reads against the thumbnail; same click semantics as the text variant — no selection model. Two densities: `comfortable` (default) carries a 40px Thumbnail and an optional `supportingText` second line; `compact` carries a 32px Thumbnail, a 14px single-line label, and exposes an inline `count` slot for an unread / quantity Badge — used for compact subscription / channel / topic rows where each row is one entity + its current count + an optional toggle.

embedded.description: Composition mode flag. When `true` (or when the List is a direct child of `.chorus-section` / `.chorus-feed`), enters **embedded mode**: zeroes its own `background` + `padding` so chrome defers to the host. Pass explicitly inside `<Section>` / `<Feed>` for the contract to be visible in JSX; the DOM-ancestry safety net in styles.css also activates the mode when omitted. See `compositionModes` in `list.family.json`.

items.description: Array of row descriptors. Each item passes `thumbnail` props forwarded verbatim to the Thumbnail component.

density.description: Row density dial. `comfortable` (default) — 40 Thumbnail, 16 label, optional supportingText second line, 8px (`layout.inline.md`) leading-to-label gap, inter-row outlineVariant divider. `compact` — 32 Thumbnail, 14 single-line label, no supportingText, 8px (`layout.inline.md`) leading-to-label gap, row Hug at 48, no inter-row divider. Compact is the reach for subscription / channel / quick-pick rows that pair an entity with an unread count and an optional favorite / mute toggle.

container.description: Outer scroll surface. Vertical stack with a transparent fill (inherits parent container tone); rows separated by a 1px outlineVariant divider, not a gap.

row.description: Single list item. Whole row is the interactive target.

leading.description: Thumbnail at the leading edge, vertically centred against the label column. Density `comfortable` renders at 40px, `compact` renders at 32px. Forwarded verbatim from item.thumbnail. `omittedBehavior: error` because every row in this variant MUST carry a thumbnail (use list/text or list/nav when no leading image is needed). `fallbackOnMissingSrc` is the dim-tone fill the Thumbnail paints when `src` is empty / fails to load — at scaffold time, agents fill `src` with `/placeholder.png` rather than relying on the fallback.

label.description: Primary row text. Density `comfortable` — 16px / Regular / onSurface. Density `compact` — 14px / Regular / onSurface. Single line; truncates with ellipsis.

supportingText.description: Secondary line under label. 14px / Regular / onSurfaceVariant, sits directly under the label with no extra gap. Density `comfortable` only — ignored when `density="compact"`.

count.description: Inline node painted between the label and the trailing edge. The canonical fill is a numeric `<Badge>` (unread / mention count), but the slot is `ReactNode`-typed and may accept any inline summary chip (`StatusTag`, a glyph-only icon). Available in both densities; sized to sit against the label baseline.

trailingIcon.description: 16px node at the trailing edge. Consumer-supplied. Accepts a decorative icon, a toggle button (favorite / mute / pin), or an inline chip. Taps on the trailing slot stop propagating before they reach the row's `onClick` — the slot is a separate hit target so the consumer can wire its own action without committing the row.

supportingText.description: Density `comfortable` only — ignored when the host List sets `density="compact"`.

thumbnail.description: Forwarded to Thumbnail verbatim (`src`, `alt`, optional `updateDot`, optional `logoBadge`).

count.description: Inline node rendered after the label. Canonical fill is a numeric `<Badge>`.

trailingIcon.description: Trailing-edge node. Wrapped in a slot that stops click propagation so the slot is its own hit target separate from the row's `onClick`.

forcedState.description: Docs-only — pins the row to a single visual state via `data-force-state`. Not for production use.

focusIndicator.description: Keyboard-focus visual — an accessibility indicator, not a lifecycle state. Composes over whichever lifecycle state the row is in.
focusIndicator.compositionReason: Rows tile the column flush with only a hairline `outlineVariant` divider between them; an outward ring would overlap the divider and the neighbouring row.

ring.outerLayerPosition: depth 0..2px from the row edge (the outer stroke)
ring.insetLayerPosition: depth 2..3px from the row edge (the counter-ring just inside the outer stroke)
ring.implementation: inset box-shadow on the row's `::before` overlay (the `::after` carries the inter-row divider). Constrained strictly inside the row's footprint and never exceeds it.

focusIndicator.trigger: :focus-visible (keyboard / programmatic focus, never plain mouse click)

behavior.keyboardNavigation: Arrow up/down moves focus between rows. Home and End jump to first / last.
behavior.rowClickTarget: Whole row is clickable when an `onClick` is bound to the item. The thumbnail is never a separate hit target.
behavior.truncationNotWrap: Both label and supportingText truncate; the row never grows to fit long text.

forbidden: thumbnail slot omitted — the variant requires a thumbnail leading slot
thumbnail rendered as a raw outside the chorus-thumbnail slot wrapper
thumbnail size different from the row's intrinsic size
supportingText paired with density="compact" — compact rows are single-line by intent; the supporting prop is ignored in that density
count and trailing slot wired to the same action — count is read-only metadata, trailing is the optional interactive node; do not collapse them
